results.title: Impact Capital inks MoU with China's KeenData to advance AI, data software adoption in Malaysia
results.description: KUALA LUMPUR: Impact Capital Holdings Bhd has signed a memorandum of understanding (MoU) with China's Beijing Kejie Technology Co Ltd (KeenData) to jointly promote the adoption of Data & AI foundational software in Malaysia.

results.title: Discover Gold Tower Thrissur: Kerala’s Tallest Luxury Residential Tower
results.description: Joyalukkas Lifestyle Developers Unveils Gold Tower Thrissur — Kerala’s Tallest Residential Tower Sets a New Benchmark for Luxury Living Thrissur, Kerala | July 2026 — Joyalukkas Lifestyle Developers officially unveiled Gold Tower Thrissur, Kerala’s tallest residential tower, at an exclusive launch event held on 16 July 2026 at Hyatt Regency, Thrissur.
